title: teucrium polium var. pii-fontii
intro: Teucrium polium var. pii-fontii, also known as Rock Tea or Rock Germander, is a plant species within the Teucrium genus, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Teucrium polium var. pii-fontii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
